TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ali Bongo Ondimba ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Ali Bongo Ondimba, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Gabon ta' misuw hya' ga Ali Bongo Ondimba, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Ali Bongo Ondimba mqwas biru sa Pantheon-Sorbonne pqwsan biru krahu. Ali Bongo Ondimba mqwas biru sa Wuhan labang pqwasan . qnxan nya Ali Bongo Ondimba maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Sylvia Valentin. bes nya hintagan beh French. Ali Bongo Ondimba maki tay kawas 1994 msqun ki Inge Lynn Collins. Ali Bongo Ondimba maki 4 la'iy: Malika Bongo Ondimba, Noureddin Bongo Valentin, Jalil Bongo Ondimba, Bilal Bongo. mintzyuwaw nya Ali Bongo Ondimba hiya ga m'sezi, maki sa kawas 1981, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ali βoŋo on*imβa rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ali βoŋo on*imβa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣaβon taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ali βoŋo on*imβa, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja ali βoŋo on*imβa mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pantħeon-s~ɕorβonne pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ali βoŋo on*imβa mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa wuħan laβaŋ pqwas~ɕan . qnxan nja ali βoŋo on*imβa maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕjl*ia *alentin. βes~ɕ nja ħintaɣan βeħ *renʦ~ʨħ. ali βoŋo on*imβa maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki iŋe ljnn ʦ~ʨollins~ɕ. ali βoŋo on*imβa maki * laʔij: malika βoŋo on*imβa, noure**in βoŋo *alentin, *alil βoŋo on*imβa, βilal βoŋo. mintzjuwaw nja ali βoŋo on*imβa ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi, maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Ali Bongo Ondimba ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Ali Bongo Ondimba, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Gabon ta' misuw hya' ga Ali Bongo Ondimba, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Ali Bongo Ondimba mqwas biru sa Pantheon-Sorbonne pqwsan biru krahu. Ali Bongo Ondimba mqwas biru sa Wuhan labang pqwasan . qnxan nya Ali Bongo Ondimba maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Sylvia Valentin. bes nya hintagan beh French. Ali Bongo Ondimba maki tay kawas 1994 msqun ki Inge Lynn Collins. Ali Bongo Ondimba maki 4 la'iy: Malika Bongo Ondimba, Noureddin Bongo Valentin, Jalil Bongo Ondimba, Bilal Bongo. mintzyuwaw nya Ali Bongo Ondimba hiya ga m'sezi, maki sa kawas 1981, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ali βoŋo on*imβa rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ali βoŋo on*imβa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣaβon taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ali βoŋo on*imβa, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja ali βoŋo on*imβa mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pantħeon-s~ɕorβonne pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ali βoŋo on*imβa mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa wuħan laβaŋ pqwas~ɕan . qnxan nja ali βoŋo on*imβa maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕjl*ia *alentin. βes~ɕ nja ħintaɣan βeħ *renʦ~ʨħ. ali βoŋo on*imβa maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki iŋe ljnn ʦ~ʨollins~ɕ. ali βoŋo on*imβa maki * laʔij: malika βoŋo on*imβa, noure**in βoŋo *alentin, *alil βoŋo on*imβa, βilal βoŋo. mintzjuwaw nja ali βoŋo on*imβa ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi, maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
